hook.headline: If she doesn’t reply to THIS I’m retiring.

reply.text: Wild thought what if that empty seat was legally reserved for me

messages.text: relax professor, i just recognized my assigned seat in that pic
the bench saw the green drink and said she needs supervision
supervision from a man who texts benches, scary 👀
benches listen better than people who ghost their iced matcha
maybe the matcha deserved it, acting too sweet
cute words, where is the proof
c minus still passing, i just need office hours beside that croissant
office hours booked, fully allergic to randoms
talkative for someone i allegedly favored, evidence please
evidence is you left me on read last april at this same spot
wait, that was you with the tragic latte art
so. what are you gonna do with that
